# Huaxing PCBA — Premium PCB & PCBA Manufacturing
> IATF 16949 certified PCB manufacturer in Shenzhen, China. 2-32 layers, HDI, SMT assembly, box-build. 80,000㎡ facility, 15+ years experience, serving 30+ countries.

## Core Pages
- [Home — PCB Manufacturing Partner](https://huaxingpcba.com/): Overview of capabilities, certifications, and factory specs
- [Capabilities — PCB Fabrication & Assembly](https://huaxingpcba.com/capabilities/): Full technical specs, layer counts, materials, testing
- [Quick Quote](https://huaxingpcba.com/quote/): Online project estimator
- [About Us](https://huaxingpcba.com/about/): Company history, certifications, team
- [Contact — Get a Quote](https://huaxingpcba.com/contact/): Submit RFQ, upload Gerber files

## Technical Resources
- [PCB Materials Guide](https://huaxingpcba.com/blog/pcb-materials-guide.html): FR-4 vs High-Tg vs Rogers vs Aluminum
- [DFM Tips](https://huaxingpcba.com/blog/dfm-tips.html): 8 design rules that cut costs by 30%
- [Surface Finish Comparison](https://huaxingpcba.com/blog/enig-vs-hasl.html): ENIG vs HASL vs OSP
- [HDI Technology](https://huaxingpcba.com/blog/hdi-technology.html): When to upgrade to microvia
- [Impedance Control](https://huaxingpcba.com/blog/impedance-control.html): Why ±5% matters at GHz speeds
- [Prototype vs Production](https://huaxingpcba.com/blog/prototype-vs-production.html): Real cost breakdown

## Key Facts
- Founded 2010, Shenzhen, China
- 80,000㎡ manufacturing facility
- 8 high-speed SMT assembly lines
- 2-32 layer PCB fabrication
- IATF 16949, ISO 9001, ISO 14001, UL certified
- IPC Class 2 & 3 compliant
- 300+ global clients across 30+ countries
- Free DFM review with every quote
- 24-hour quote response for prototypes
